title: Generate Sakila JSON example data
description: Run the Sakila transform to produce a small, committed JSON dataset for docs and examples.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Starting data generation task: will run examples/sakila/build_sakila.py to produce JSON dataset for docs.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Ran /opt/anaconda3/bin/conda run -n virtuus python examples/sakila/build_sakila.py. Generated examples/sakila/data with counts: customers=3, rentals=133, payments=133, inventory=131, films=123, film_actor=708, actors=196 (total 1427).

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Follow-up: updated builder to stringify IDs and inject an id field mirroring the primary key for each record, then regenerated examples/sakila/data with --force.
